runTitle: Dashboard AI app-shell local Playwright rerun
coveredSurfaces: /dashboard desktop side navigation labels and contrast
left navigation rail collapse while AI sidebar is open
AI sidebar resize shrink and grow drag
skippedSurfaces: Vercel production validation: local source verification only
AI backend streaming response quality: not required for navigation/layout change
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints: out of scope
notes: Fresh local dev server started with npm run dev on port 3000 before Playwright MCP verification.
Initial all-in-one probe saw a transient dialog-count mismatch at 800ms after reopen; focused reproduction with 1600ms stabilization returned one AI sidebar dialog.
Initial resize probe started at persisted max width 960px, so grow-only drag could not increase. Focused bidirectional probe confirmed 960px -> 780px shrink and 780px -> 940px grow.
Desktop nav labels rendered in non-white oklch text, active font-weight 600 and inactive 500.
Pressing g on /dashboard did not mutate the URL and did not type into an app input.
Browser console errors observed during the rerun: 0. Local dev warnings were present but non-blocking.
